recommendations.title: High Heels
recommendations.overview: After being estranged for 15 years, flamboyant actress Becky del Paramo re-enters her daughter Rebeca's life when she comes to perform a concert.  Rebeca, she finds, is now married to one of Becky's ex-lovers, Manuel. The mother and daughter begin ma

recommendations.title: The Shawshank Redemption
recommendations.overview: Imprisoned in the 1940s for the double murder of his wife and her lover, upstanding banker Andy Dufresne begins a new life at the Shawshank prison, where he puts his accounting skills to work for an amoral warden. During his long stretch in prison, D

recommendations.title: Sling Blade
recommendations.overview: Karl Childers, a mentally disabled man, has been in the custody of the state mental hospital since the age of 12 for killing his mother and her lover. Although thoroughly institutionalized, he is deemed fit to be released into the outside world.

recommendations.title: What's Eating Gilbert Grape
recommendations.overview: Gilbert Grape is a small-town young man with a lot of responsibility. Chief among his concerns are his mother, who is so overweight that she can't leave the house, and his mentally impaired younger brother, Arnie, who has a knack for finding trouble.

recommendations.title: Dead Man's Shoes
recommendations.overview: A soldier returns to his small town and exacts a deadly revenge on the thugs who tormented his disabled brother while he was away.

recommendations.title: First Love
recommendations.overview: One night in Tokyo, Leo, a young boxer, meets his first love, Monica, an imprisoned sex worker. Caught up in a drug-smuggling scheme, they find themselves pursued by a corrupt cop, a yakuza, his nemesis, and a female assassin.

recommendations.title: The Miracle
recommendations.overview: 1960s Turkey countryside. A newly assigned teacher finds out that the solitary village is missing a school. He gets fond of the village people and especially a disabled man. The teacher helps the village to build a new school and educate the children

recommendations.title: Miracle in Cell No. 7
recommendations.overview: A story about a mentally ill man wrongfully imprisoned for murder and his relationship with his 6 year old daughter.

recommendations.title: The Wrath of Becky
recommendations.overview: Two years after she escaped a violent attack on her family, 16-year-old Becky attempts to rebuild her life in the care of an older woman -- a kindred spirit named Elena. However, when a violent group known as the Noble Men break into their home, atta

recommendations.title: Fall
